query:
SELECT path,
                      value as "value!: sqlx::types::Json<Box<serde_json::value::RawValue>>",
                      created_at
               FROM draft
               WHERE workspace_id = $1
                 AND typ = 'flow'
                 AND email = $2
                 AND NOT EXISTS (
                     SELECT 1 FROM flow f
                     WHERE f.workspace_id = draft.workspace_id
                       AND f.path = draft.path
                 )
